name: Apple Walnut Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to 325°F.
2. Place bread cubes in a large bowl.
3. Melt butter in a medium skillet over medium heat.
4. Chop parsley.
5. Cook chopped parsley, celery, onion with melted butter for about five minutes, stirring occasionally until softened.
6. Mix the cooked vegetables with bread cubes.
7. Beat eggs and mix with chicken broth and pepper.
8. Add the egg mixture to the bread and vegetable mixture; stir well.
9. Stir in apples and walnuts.
10. Bake in a greased 2-quart dish for 25 minutes. If desired, cook slightly longer for a crispier texture.
11. Serve hot.
